## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Chore

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Manual UX verification for impacted screens

## Screenshots / Demo (if UI changes)

Add screenshots or a short clip.

## Checklist

- [ ] Kept changes scoped and avoided unrelated refactors
- [ ] Added/updated docs where needed
- [ ] Preserved mobile-first behavior
- [ ] Confirmed no regression in dashboard/week/month primary flows
